text: The provided implementation of the Bellman-Ford algorithm is incorrect because it tries to update edge weights instead of the minimum distances to nodes. This causes the distances to remain infinite except for the source node. The Bellman-Ford algorithm should relax the edges by updating the distances to target nodes, not edge weights, over V-1 iterations.

data.label: The shortest_paths function implementation of Bellman-Ford is incorrect.
Test cases show all node distances except source remain infinite in results, differing from expected minimal distances.
The implementation updates edge weights instead of updating distance to nodes.
Bellman-Ford algorithm requires relaxing edges by updating node distances, not the edge weights.
